content:
# Shopify Polaris - Overview

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: admin first use, empty table, empty list, feature activation, commerce setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/layout-and-structure/empty-state

Visual traits:
- encouraging
- clear
- action-led
- friendly
- guided

Use when:
- admin first use
- empty table
- empty list
- feature activation
- commerce setup

Avoid when:
- inline field error
- loading
- confirmation

AI summary: Use Polaris empty states for commerce/admin first-run experiences: explain value, guide activation, use one clear primary CTA, and keep copy encouraging and specific.

# Shopify Polaris - Layout Rules

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: admin first use, empty table, empty list, feature activation, commerce setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/layout-and-structure/empty-state

- Use empty state to explain a feature before the user has used it.
- Use one primary CTA and optional secondary learning action.
- Keep copy simple, specific, and action-oriented.

AI summary: Use Polaris empty states for commerce/admin first-run experiences: explain value, guide activation, use one clear primary CTA, and keep copy encouraging and specific.

# Shopify Polaris - Component Patterns

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: admin first use, empty table, empty list, feature activation, commerce setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/layout-and-structure/empty-state

- heading
- explanatory body
- illustration
- primary CTA
- secondary action
- footer context

AI summary: Use Polaris empty states for commerce/admin first-run experiences: explain value, guide activation, use one clear primary CTA, and keep copy encouraging and specific.

# Shopify Polaris - Interaction States

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: admin first use, empty table, empty list, feature activation, commerce setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/layout-and-structure/empty-state

- first run
- no items
- needs setup
- learn more

AI summary: Use Polaris empty states for commerce/admin first-run experiences: explain value, guide activation, use one clear primary CTA, and keep copy encouraging and specific.

# Shopify Polaris - Accessibility Notes

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: admin first use, empty table, empty list, feature activation, commerce setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/layout-and-structure/empty-state

- Treat decorative empty-state illustrations as non-essential to screen reader understanding.
- Button text should predict the result of the action.

AI summary: Use Polaris empty states for commerce/admin first-run experiences: explain value, guide activation, use one clear primary CTA, and keep copy encouraging and specific.

# Shopify Polaris - Implementation Hints

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: admin first use, empty table, empty list, feature activation, commerce setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/layout-and-structure/empty-state

- Use verb+noun CTA labels such as 'Create order' rather than vague labels.
- Avoid blaming the user for lack of content.
- Use for full-page admin emptiness, not every small missing component.

AI summary: Use Polaris empty states for commerce/admin first-run experiences: explain value, guide activation, use one clear primary CTA, and keep copy encouraging and specific.
